item.quote: This is mhy first line of text on this tool. I want to see how it renders out.
item.name: Jason Sass

item.quote: I believe this is working really well. I think Matthew Gardner and Devin will enjoy how flexible this really is.
item.attribution: - Devin Tucker / 2.08.25 / Trail Blazers vs Lakers
item.name: Devin Tucker

item.quote: I can't imagine doing this any other way now, as it really speeds up the process of putting text on a static background.
item.name: Matthew Gardner
